name: Acme Corp
notes: Applied, had 3 rounds of interviews, then complete silence for 6+ weeks.

name: TechGiant Inc
notes: Offer rescinded via automated email with no explanation given.

name: StartupXYZ
notes: Final round interview after 5 rounds total, told they'd follow up within a week. Never heard back.

name: MegaCorp Solutions
notes: 6-month process with 8 rounds. No clear timeline communicated and disappeared after the final round.

name: Innovate Labs
notes: Completed a 4-hour take-home only to receive an offer 40% below the posted range with no room to negotiate.

name: Global Dynamics
notes: Recruiter was dismissive during the screen and the company never responded to two follow-up emails.
